name: Nuevo Estrada
description: Varrio Nuevo Estrada is a predominately Hispanic street gang from the Boyle Heights section of Los Angeles. They formed in the Estrada Courts housing projects off Olympic Boulevard during the 1950s in response to the older more established varrios in the area taking on the name “Nuevo” to signify a new generation varrio.

sources.title: Nuevo Estrada In Boyle Heights Estrada Courts — Wikipedia
